title: Denver Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Denver, with a Z-Score of -3.31. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a significant impact on daily life.
The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high humidity level of 72% and moderate winds of 9.0 km/h.
The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols immediately due to the critical weather conditions.
